title: androrchis patens
intro: Androrchis patens, also known as Spiranthes cernua, is a type of orchid plant that is native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Androrchis patens include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Androrchis patens can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
